title: Disable Accessibility Screen
description: Removes the Accessibility Screen on first launch, introduced with 23w03a
body:
When launching into a new Minecraft instance, you are greeted with an Accessibility Screen where you are able to turn of the Narrator & modify other options.

This mod skips that menu, launching into the main menu instantly, while making sure the Narrator is disabled.

![Crossed out Accessibility Screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/DohVVqgL/images/975678d383c2f0c470a5281f7e3b7920b371bd8d.png)
